text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Scientists unanimously agree that intervention Z is harmless in every circumstance.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Scientists unanimously agree that intervention Z is harmless in every circumstance.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly asserts that all scientists concur that intervention Z poses no harm under any conditions, which is the claim being extracted.","population":"Scientists","intervention":"intervention Z","comparator":"","outcome":"harmless in every circumstance","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"unanimously","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The memo provides no citation, survey, review, or named scientific body supporting that claim.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"The memo provides no citation, survey, review, or named scientific body supporting that claim.","entailment":"The quoted sentence states that the memo lacks any citation, survey, review, or named scientific body to back up the claim, which is the methodological claim extracted.","population":"the memo","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"no citation, survey, review, or named scientific body supporting that claim","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
